message: The capability request parser proves only the dynptr tag slice, then reads larger request structs returned by bpf_dynptr_data without a non-null proof
required_proof: each bpf_dynptr_data result for a request payload struct must be proven non-null, or the dynptr length must otherwise prove the requested slice, before reading payload fields

source_span.label: reload-update payload struct is read while still mem_or_null

related_spans.label: this null check proves only the 32-bit tag slice
the larger payload slice needs its own proof
the rule payload path has the same dynptr slice obligation

evidence.detail: bpf_dynptr_data returns mem_or_null for a requested slice; proving the tag pointer is non-null does not prove a larger struct slice

help: After each payload-sized bpf_dynptr_data call, check the returned pointer before reading fields, or add an equivalent verifier-visible dynptr length proof for that payload size.
Keep the tag-dispatched reload-update and reload-rule handling; returning a constant action or bypassing dynptr payload parsing is not an equivalent repair.
